nasb.text: But Elymas the magician (for so his name is translated) was opposing them, seeking to turn the proconsul away from the faith.

esv.text: But Elymas the magician (for that is the meaning of his name) opposed them, seeking to turn the proconsul away from the faith.

cnv.text: 但術士以呂馬與使徒作對，要使省長轉離真道。

ccb.text: 但希腊名字叫以吕马的那个术士反对使徒，试图拦阻总督信主。

csbs.text: 但那行法术的以路摩——他的名字翻译出来就是“行法术的”——却抵挡他们，企图使省长转离这信仰。
